name: DeMiriam Magic: Blueprint of Miracle
short_description: Create your sweet memories with the girls on the island, manage and build your own island in a relaxed atmosphere, operate the island's airport, and try driving a small plane to visit the island you have built
detailed_description:
※The developers have explained to everyone the reasons for the lack of updates since August 2024 until March 2025.

We acknowledge that during the game development, data loss and damage occurred, forcing the project to start anew. During this period, due to handling the re-development and configuration of game assets, no progress reports were published.

Currently, the game is in the stage of being rebuilt from scratch. Although we have restored some functions and assets using data recovery techniques, we also recognized issues that existed at launch, so the game started fresh with many reforms on its features. The early access phase will last between 7 to 19 months. We know the development progress is significantly behind schedule, and it still faces the adverse effects of prolonged development time. Therefore, please stay patient and look forward to positive and friendly feedback and communication.

The content page will be updated in subsequent updates.

Airport City and Miracle's Arrival

Experience the joy of managing and building your own little island!

You and your adventure partners discovered a small island never recorded on any map while flying. Even more surprising, you became the lord of this island. Making it prosperous is now your task. Other cities have already built infrastructure—a small airport and a transit line. Arrange flight schedules to collect resources. In the future, new stories will begin...

There's a small plane at the airport that you can drive yourself. Try piloting the plane to tour your constructed little island!

Create only our own miracle blueprint on this island.

• Features

Immersive experience with first-person point of view without any character definition—directly explore the cityscapes or start new stories and leave behind wonderful memories. A third-person overhead view will be added in the future.

Watch the entire process from taxiing to takeoff after assigning flight tasks.

Appreciate the cityscape or plane takeoffs and landings from the control tower.

・[Early Access] Some currently known situations:

(1) Residents on the island: More residents are needed to make the island lively. Future updates will bring more residents beyond just you and your adventure partners.

(2) Title: "Magic": This project is a possibility that I created while creating the theme project "DeMiriam Magic". I think I need to create a relaxed atmosphere, so this project is here. How to reflect "magic" in this project has been something I have been thinking about. At the same time, I hope everyone can look forward to the novel "DeMiriam Magic" that I have been working on since 2016 (although it has not been published yet), which may be released soon.

・Contact me

 Email me please!

supported_languages:
English, Japanese*, Simplified Chinese, Traditional Chinese
*languages with full audio support
